content.p:
All moneys in the fund created by Sec. 2.70 shall be expended exclusively for the purposes authorized by, and subject to the provisions of Article 5,
Chapter 1
, Division 1 of the Streets and Highways Code of the State, as amended.
* See Sts. & H. C. A., Sec. 181 et seq. As to streets and sidewalks generally, see Chap. 27 of this Code. As to taxation generally, see Chap. 29.
